args.query: SELECT Id, AccountId, ContactId, CloseDate, CreatedDate FROM Opportunity WHERE REPLACE(ContactId,'#','') = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR';

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, AccountId, ContactId, CloseDate, CreatedDate FROM Opportunity WHERE REPLACE(ContactId,'#','') = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR';

args.query: SELECT oli.OpportunityId, oli.Product2Id FROM OpportunityLineItem oli JOIN Opportunity o ON o.Id = oli.OpportunityId WHERE REPLACE(o.ContactId,'#','')='003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR' AND o.CloseDate >= '2021-06-15' AND o.CloseDate < '2021-07-15';

exec_args.sql: SELECT oli.OpportunityId, oli.Product2Id FROM OpportunityLineItem oli JOIN Opportunity o ON o.Id = oli.OpportunityId WHERE REPLACE(o.ContactId,'#','')='003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR' AND o.CloseDate >= '2021-06-15' AND o.CloseDate < '2021-07-15';

args.query: SELECT Id, Name, Description FROM Product2 WHERE LOWER(Name) LIKE '%ai%' OR LOWER(Description) LIKE '%ai%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, Name, Description FROM Product2 WHERE LOWER(Name) LIKE '%ai%' OR LOWER(Description) LIKE '%ai%';

args.code:
import json, pandas as pd
oli = pd.DataFrame(var_call_tUEvAeA1m7pgK59zOwP7iLqo)
prod = pd.DataFrame(var_call_kXkU17gNSQgmvzllR1C8jJ7a)
oli['Product2Id_clean']=oli['Product2Id'].str.replace('#','', regex=False)
prod['Id_clean']=prod['Id'].str.replace('#','', regex=False)
merged=oli.merge(prod, left_on='Product2Id_clean', right_on='Id_clean', how='left')
# choose AI processing unit: interpret as AI product among purchased; pick one with AI in name/description
merged['is_ai']=merged['Name'].str.contains('AI', case=False, na=False) | merged['Description'].str.contains('AI', case=False, na=False)
ai=merged[merged['is_ai']].copy()
# pick first unique product id
pid = None
if len(ai)>0:
    pid = ai.iloc[0]['Product2Id_clean']
result = json.dumps(pid)
print('__RESULT__:')
print(result)
